issues.title: Bundle a default font (Bebas Neue) so it works out of the box
issues.notes: Downloaded BebasNeue.ttf (298KB), added to config.py DEFAULT_FONT, updated text.py font path order

issues.title: Add singer avatar / thumbnail in corner
issues.notes: Added --avatar, --avatar-pos, --avatar-size, --avatar-opacity options to CLI. Rendered via PIL in composit.py frame loop with 4-corner positioning.

issues.title: Custom color themes per lyric line
issues.notes: [color:#RRGGBB] tags in LRC parsed and applied per-line. LyricLine dataclass extended with text_color and highlight_color fields. Rendering functions accept per-line colors.

issues.title: Batch mode — process multiple songs in one run
issues.notes: Added `karaokefx batch` command with --input-dir, --output-dir, --workers N. Scans for audio files, matches .lrc by name, processes all pairs.

issues.title: Export as GIF (in addition to MP4)
issues.notes: Added `karaokefx gifify` command. Two-pass FFmpeg palette generation for quality. --width 480, --fps 15 defaults.

issues.title: Auto-detect BPM for better plain-text lyrics sync
issues.notes: librosa.beat.beat_track used for auto BPM detection. --bpm flag for override. Beat-synchronized line distribution in parse_plain_text().

issues.title: Clean up sync.py — remove dead code and fix API
issues.notes: Removed LycLine alias, removed unused num_lines param, replaced +30s magic number with real audio_duration_ms
